# Hubspot-Training
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>HubSpot Training &mdash; educate.ie</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html,body{height:100%;width:100%;overflow:hidden;font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif}
:root{--bg:#2C5F2E;--bg2:#3A7D3C;--bgdk:#1A3D1C;--lime:#A8D55A;--lime2:#C8E87A;--lf:rgba(168,213,90,0.14);--lb:rgba(168,213,90,0.35);--ink:#12280F;--w60:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);--w40:rgba(255,255,255,0.42);--w20:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);--dk:#1E5631}
body{background:var(--bg);color:#fff}
.slide{display:none;height:100vh;width:100vw;position:relative;flex-direction:column}
.slide.active{display:flex}
.nb{position:fixed;bottom:1.8rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;z-index:1000;background:rgba(26,61,28,0.92);padding:10px 20px;border-radius:40px;border:1px solid var(--lb)}
.nb button{background:none;border:none;color:var(--lime);cursor:pointer;font-size:1.2rem;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:20px}
.nb button:hover{background:var(--lf)}
.dots{display:flex;gap:5px;align-items:center}
.dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(168,213,90,0.25);transition:all 0.3s;cursor:pointer}
.dot.active{width:20px;background:var(--lime)}
.ctr{color:var(--w40);font-size:0.72rem;min-width:52px;text-align:center}
.kh{position:fixed;top:1.2rem;right:1.5rem;font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--w20);z-index:1000;display:flex;gap:5px}
.kb{background:var(--w20);border:1px solid var(--w20);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px}
.tag{display:inline-block;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase}
.tg{background:var(--lf);border:1px solid var(--lb);color:var(--lime)}
.ta{background:rgba(245,195,58,0.14);border:1px solid rgba(245,195,58,0.38);color:#F5C33A}
.tw{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.22);color:#fff}
.s-cover{background:var(--bgdk);justify-content:center;align-items:center;text-align:center}
.cv-ring{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.18);pointer-events:none}
.r1{width:520px;height:520px;top:-170px;right:-130px}.r2{width:340px;height:340px;bottom:-110px;left:-90px}
.cv-fill{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:var(--lime);opacity:0.05;pointer-events:none}
.f1{width:620px;height:620px;top:-200px;right:-160px}.f2{width:360px;height:360px;bottom:-130px;left:-100px}
.cv-ey{font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--w40);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2rem}
.cv-title{font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,5rem);font-weight:900;line-height:0.95;letter-spacing:-0.03em;margin-bottom:1.5rem;color:#fff}
.cv-title em{color:var(--lime);font-style:normal}
.cv-sub{font-size:1rem;color:var(--w60);max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;line-height:1.65}
.cv-chips{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.chip{padding:5px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--lf);border:1px solid var(--lb);color:var(--lime)}
.s-ov{flex-direction:row;background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.ov-l{width:28%;background:var(--bg);padding:3rem 2.5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.ov-r{flex:1;padding:2.5rem 2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.ov-title{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.5rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.05;margin:1rem 0}
.ov-sub{color:var(--w60);font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.6}
.ml{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-top:0.5rem}
.mr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #e5ede5;transition:all 0.18s}
.mr:hover{background:#f3fae8;border-color:var(--lime)}
.mb{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--lime);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:0.78rem;flex-shrink:0}
.mn{font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--ink)}.md{font-size:0.74rem;color:#666;margin-top:1px}
.s-mi{background:var(--bg2);justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start}
.mi-bg{position:absolute;right:3%;bottom:-4%;font-size:clamp(10rem,20vw,16rem);font-weight:900;color:rgba(168,213,90,0.1);line-height:1;letter-spacing:-0.05em;pointer-events:none;user-select:none}
.mi-body{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:680px;padding:4rem}
.mi-pre{font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;color:var(--lime);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.mi-title{font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5.5vw,4rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1;color:#fff;margin-bottom:2rem}
.mi-lo{background:rgba(168,213,90,0.1);border-left:3px solid var(--lime);padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0}
.mi-ey{font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:var(--lime);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5rem}
.mi-tx{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);font-size:1rem;line-height:1.65}
.s-think{background:var(--bgdk);justify-content:center;align-items:center}
.tk-w{max-width:820px;width:100%;padding:2.5rem}
.tk-q{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.1;margin:1.2rem 0 2rem}
.tk-q mark{background:none;color:var(--lime)}
.tk-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:2rem}
.tc{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:16px;padding:1.5rem 1rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.22s}
.tc:hover,.tc.picked{background:var(--lf);border-color:var(--lime);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.tc-i{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:10px}.tc-l{font-size:0.88rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-weight:600}
.tk-p{padding:1.2rem 1.8rem;border-radius:14px;background:var(--lf);border:1px solid var(--lb);font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--lime);text-align:center;opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);transition:all 0.4s}
.tk-p.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.s-crm{flex-direction:row;background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.crm-l{width:44%;background:var(--bgdk);padding:3rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.crm-r{flex:1;padding:2.5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;overflow-y:auto}
.crm-title{font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.05;margin:0.8rem 0 1.2rem}
.crm-def{color:var(--w60);font-size:0.95rem;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.crm-stat{background:rgba(168,213,90,0.12);border-left:3px solid var(--lime);padding:0.9rem 1.2rem;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;margin-bottom:0.8rem}
.crm-num{font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--lime)}.crm-lbl{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--w40);margin-top:2px}
.crm-pts{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.crm-pt{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start}
.crm-ic{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:12px;background:#f2fae8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0}
.crm-pt-t{font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:3px}.crm-pt-b{font-size:0.85rem;color:#555;line-height:1.55}
.s-isnt{background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.isn-hd{padding:2rem 3rem 1.2rem;border-bottom:1px solid #e5eae5}
.isn-hd h2{font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);margin-top:0.6rem}
.isn-body{flex:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
.isn-col{padding:2rem 3rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px}
.isn-col.do{border-right:1px solid #e5eae5}
.isn-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:0.4rem}
.isn-hdr h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
.do .isn-hdr h3{color:#1E5631}.dont .isn-hdr h3{color:#b52020}
.isn-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 15px;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:500}
.do .isn-row{background:#f0f7e8;color:#1E5631}.dont .isn-row{background:#fdf0f0;color:#8b2020}
.s-nav{flex-direction:row;background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.nav-l{width:44%;background:var(--bg);padding:3rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.nav-r{flex:1;padding:2.5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.nav-mk{background:#161f17;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:1rem}
.nav-tb{background:#0f1710;padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.tl{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%}
.nav-its{padding:10px 6px}
.nav-sec{padding:4px 12px;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.14em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:8px}
.nav-it{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.84rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.18s;user-select:none}
.nav-it:hover,.nav-it.on{background:rgba(168,213,90,0.15);color:var(--lime2)}
.callouts{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px}
.callout{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}
.cn{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--lime);color:var(--ink);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:0.75rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px}
.ct{font-size:0.88rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);line-height:1.5}.ct strong{color:#fff}
#nav-tip{padding:11px 15px;background:#f0f7e8;border:1px solid #c5dfa0;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.85rem;color:#1E5631;font-weight:500;min-height:44px}
.s-obj{background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.obj-hd{padding:1.8rem 3rem 0.9rem;border-bottom:1px solid #e5eae5}
.obj-hd h2{font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);margin-top:0.5rem}
.obj-hd p{font-size:0.85rem;color:#888;margin-top:3px}
.obj-grid{flex:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}
.obj{padding:1.8rem 1.5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;border-right:1px solid #e5eae5;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.18s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.obj:last-child{border-right:none}.obj:hover{background:#fafdf5}
.obj-n{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:#8DC63F;margin-bottom:0.8rem;text-transform:uppercase}
.obj-icon{width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:0.9rem}
.obj-name{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:3px}
.obj-type{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:0.6rem}
.obj-desc{font-size:0.83rem;color:#555;line-height:1.55;flex:1}
.obj-eg{margin-top:0.8rem;font-size:0.74rem;color:#1E5631;font-weight:600;font-style:italic}
.obj-flip{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg);color:#fff;padding:1.4rem;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity 0.25s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.obj.flipped .obj-flip{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
.obj-flip h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--lime);margin-bottom:0.6rem}
.obj-flip p{font-size:0.83rem;line-height:1.6;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85)}
.obj-flip ul{margin-top:0.5rem;padding-left:1.1rem}
.obj-flip ul li{font-size:0.79rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.72);margin-bottom:4px}
.obj-hint{font-size:0.65rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.28);margin-top:auto;text-align:right}
.s-pan{background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.pan-hd{padding:1.8rem 3rem 0.9rem;border-bottom:1px solid #e5eae5}
.pan-hd h2{font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);margin-top:0.5rem}
.pan-body{flex:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
.pan-col{padding:1.6rem 2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;border-right:1px solid #e5eae5;min-width:0}
.pan-col:last-child{border-right:none}
.pan-lbl{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.25rem}
.pan-name{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:0.8rem;padding-bottom:0.7rem}
.pl .pan-lbl{color:#1E5631}.pl .pan-name{border-bottom:2px solid #1E5631}
.pc .pan-lbl{color:#1E5631}.pc .pan-name{border-bottom:2px solid #8DC63F}
.pr .pan-lbl{color:#B8860B}.pr .pan-name{border-bottom:2px solid #F5A623}
.pan-items{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;flex:1}
.pan-item{padding:8px 12px;border-radius:9px;font-size:0.82rem;line-height:1.45;color:#333}
.pl .pan-item{background:#edf5dc;border-left:3px solid #1E5631}
.pc .pan-item{background:#f0f7e8;border-left:3px solid #8DC63F}
.pr .pan-item{background:#fef9ec;border-left:3px solid #F5A623}
.pan-note{margin-top:auto;padding-top:0.8rem;border-top:1px solid #eee;font-size:0.74rem;color:#999;font-style:italic;line-height:1.5}
.s-ss{background:var(--bgdk);flex-direction:column}
.ss-img{flex:1;min-height:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:1.5rem 2rem 0.8rem}
.ss-img img{max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.2);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)}
.ss-bar{flex:0 0 auto;padding:0.9rem 2rem 1.4rem;display:flex;gap:3rem;align-items:flex-start;border-top:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.12)}
.ss-bar-l{flex:0 0 auto;min-width:240px}
.ss-bar-r{flex:1;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.4rem 2rem}
.ss-title{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;color:#fff;margin:0.3rem 0}
.ss-cap{font-size:0.76rem;color:var(--lime);font-style:italic;margin-top:0.3rem;max-width:280px}
.ss-pt{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--w60);line-height:1.4;min-width:240px;flex:1}
.ss-pt strong{color:#fff}.ss-arr{color:var(--lime);flex-shrink:0}
.s-ss2{background:var(--bgdk);flex-direction:row}
.ss2-left{width:40%;padding:3rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;border-right:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.12)}
.ss2-title{font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.1;margin:0.6rem 0 1rem}
.ss2-body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;flex:1}
.ss-pt2{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--w60);line-height:1.5}
.ss-pt2 strong{color:#fff}
.ss2-cap{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--lime);font-style:italic;margin-top:1rem;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(168,213,90,0.08);border:1px solid var(--lb);border-radius:8px}
.ss2-right{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:2rem}
.ss2-right img{max-width:100%;max-height:calc(100vh - 60px);object-fit:contain;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.2);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)}
.s-login{background:var(--bgdk);flex-direction:row}
.login-l{width:42%;padding:4rem 3rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;border-right:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.12)}
.login-r{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:3rem}
.login-r img{max-height:calc(100vh - 80px);max-width:100%;object-fit:contain;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.2);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)}
.login-title{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.6rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.1;margin:0.8rem 0 1.2rem}
.login-pts{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.login-pt{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--w60);line-height:1.5}
.login-pt strong{color:#fff}
.login-tip{margin-top:1.5rem;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(168,213,90,0.08);border:1px solid var(--lb);border-radius:10px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--lime);line-height:1.5}
.s-info{background:#fff;color:var(--ink)}
.info-hd{padding:1.8rem 3rem 1rem;border-bottom:1px solid #e5eae5}
.info-hd h2{font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);margin-top:0.5rem}
.info-hd p{font-size:0.9rem;color:#666;margin-top:4px}
.info-body{flex:1;display:flex;gap:0;overflow:hidden}
.info-col{flex:1;padding:1.5rem 2rem;border-right:1px solid #e5eae5;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;overflow-y:auto}
.info-col:last-child{border-right:none}
.info-col-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--dk);margin-bottom:6px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--lime)}
.info-item{padding:8px 12px;background:#f2fae8;border-left:3px solid var(--lime);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;font-size:0.82rem;color:#333;line-height:1.45}
.s-sum{background:var(--dk);justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.sum-tick{position:absolute;right:4%;bottom:-5%;font-size:16rem;font-weight:900;color:rgba(168,213,90,0.08);line-height:1}
.sum-tag{padding:2.5rem 3.5rem 0}
.sum-title{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.2vw,2.4rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;padding:0.8rem 3.5rem 1.5rem;line-height:1.1}
.sum-rows{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;padding:0 3.5rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.sum-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.2);border-radius:10px}
.sum-num{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--lime);flex-shrink:0;width:28px}
.sum-text{font-size:0.9rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);line-height:1.55}
.s-ex{background:var(--bgdk);justify-content:center;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.ex-bg{position:absolute;font-size:clamp(6rem,14vw,10rem);font-weight:900;color:rgba(168,213,90,0.06);right:3%;bottom:0;line-height:1;pointer-events:none}
.ex-body-wrap{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:800px;width:100%;padding:3rem}
.ex-title{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.05;margin:0.8rem 0 0.5rem}
.ex-instruct{font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--w60);margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.ex-steps{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.ex-step{display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.18);border-radius:10px}
.ex-num{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--lime);flex-shrink:0;line-height:1.1;width:36px}
.ex-body{flex:1}
.ex-step-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:3px}
.ex-step-desc{font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--w60);line-height:1.45}
.s-tips{background:var(--bgdk);flex-direction:column}
.tips-hd{padding:2rem 3rem 1.2rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.15)}
.tips-hd h2{font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:#fff;margin-top:0.6rem}
.tips-body{flex:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:16px;padding:2rem 3rem}
.tip-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.2);border-radius:14px;padding:1.5rem}
.tip-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--lime);margin-bottom:0.6rem}
.tip-body{font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--w60);line-height:1.6}
.s-bylive{background:var(--dk);justify-content:center;align-items:center}
.bylive-inner{max-width:680px;width:100%;padding:3rem}
.bylive-title{font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.05;margin:0.8rem 0 0.6rem}
.bylive-intro{font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--w60);margin-bottom:1.8rem;font-style:italic}
.bylive-steps{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.bylive-step{display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start}
.bylive-num{font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--lime);flex-shrink:0;line-height:1;width:40px}
.bylive-text{font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:#fff;line-height:1.55;padding-top:4px}
.bylive-note{margin-top:1.5rem;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(168,213,90,0.1);border:1px solid var(--lb);border-radius:10px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--lime);font-style:italic}
.s-end{background:var(--bgdk);justify-content:center;align-items:center;text-align:center}
.end-rings{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}
.end-ring{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.1)}
.e1{width:600px;height:600px;top:-200px;left:-150px}.e2{width:400px;height:400px;bottom:-100px;right:-100px}
.end-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:680px;padding:2rem}
.end-check{width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:22px;background:var(--lf);border:1px solid var(--lb);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 2rem;font-size:2.2rem}
.end-title{font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5vw,4rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1;margin-bottom:1rem}
.end-title em{color:var(--lime);font-style:normal}
.end-sub{font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--w60);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:2rem;max-width:500px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}
.end-recap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:2rem}
.er{background:var(--lf);border:1px solid var(--lb);border-radius:12px;padding:12px}
.er-num{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--lime)}.er-lbl{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--w40);margin-top:4px}
.end-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center}
.btn-p{padding:11px 26px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--lime);color:var(--ink);font-weight:800;font-size:0.9rem;border:none;cursor:pointer}
.btn-p:hover{background:var(--lime2)}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="kh"><span class="kb">&larr;</span><span class="kb">&rarr;</span></div>
<div class="slide active s-cover" id="s0">
  <div class="cv-fill f1"></div><div class="cv-fill f2"></div>
  <div class="cv-ring r1"></div><div class="cv-ring r2"></div>
  <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;text-align:center;padding:2rem">
    <div class="cv-ey">educate.ie &middot; HubSpot Training &middot; All Modules</div>
    <div class="cv-title">Welcome to<br><em>HubSpot.</em></div>
    <div class="cv-sub">One system for every school, every teacher, and every interaction.</div>
    <div class="cv-chips">
      <span class="chip">01 What Is a CRM?</span><span class="chip">02 Navigating HubSpot</span>
      <span class="chip">03 Objects</span><span class="chip">04 Navigating Records</span>
      <span class="chip">05 Search Before Creating</span><span class="chip">06 Logging Activity</span>
      <span class="chip">07 Tasks</span><span class="chip">08 Duplicates</span>
      <span class="chip">09 Data Validation</span><span class="chip">10 Governance</span><span class="chip">11 Mobile App</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ov" id="s1">
  <div class="ov-l"><span class="tag tg">Today</span><div class="ov-title">Eleven modules.</div>
    <div class="ov-sub">By the end you can log in, find any school or teacher, log activity, manage tasks, and maintain clean data.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ov-r">
    <div class="ml">
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">01</div><div><div class="mn">What Is a CRM?</div><div class="md">Why HubSpot and what it isn&#39;t</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">02</div><div><div class="mn">Navigating HubSpot</div><div class="md">Layout, search, filtered views</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">03</div><div><div class="mn">Objects</div><div class="md">Contacts, Schools, Deals, Tasks</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">04</div><div><div class="mn">Navigating Records</div><div class="md">Three-panel layout</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">05</div><div><div class="mn">Search Before Creating</div><div class="md">The golden rule</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">06</div><div><div class="mn">Logging Activity</div><div class="md">Notes, calls, emails, meetings</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="ov-r">
    <div class="ml">
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">07</div><div><div class="mn">Tasks</div><div class="md">Queue, creation, completion</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">08</div><div><div class="mn">Duplicates</div><div class="md">Find, flag, never merge</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">09</div><div><div class="mn">Data Validation</div><div class="md">Three types of bad data</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">10</div><div><div class="mn">Governance</div><div class="md">Naming, ownership, approvals</div></div></div>
      <div class="mr"><div class="mb">11</div><div><div class="mn">Mobile App</div><div class="md">Log from anywhere</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s2">
  <div class="mi-bg">01</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 01</div>
    <div class="mi-title">What Is<br>a CRM?</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Understand what HubSpot is, why educate.ie is introducing it, and what it is not.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-think" id="s3">
  <div class="tk-w">
    <span class="tag ta">Think about this</span>
    <div class="tk-q">Where do you currently store information about a school <mark>after a visit?</mark></div>
    <div class="tk-cards"><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p1')"><div class="tc-i">&#x1F9E0;</div><div class="tc-l">In my head</div></div><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p1')"><div class="tc-i">&#x1F4D3;</div><div class="tc-l">Paper / notebook</div></div><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p1')"><div class="tc-i">&#x1F4CA;</div><div class="tc-l">A spreadsheet</div></div><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p1')"><div class="tc-i">&#x1F4E7;</div><div class="tc-l">Email threads</div></div></div>
    <div class="tk-p" id="p1">HubSpot replaces all four. One place. Always up to date. Visible to the whole team.</div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-crm" id="s4">
  <div class="crm-l"><span class="tag tg">Module 01</span>
    <div class="crm-title">What Is<br>a CRM?</div>
    <div class="crm-def">One shared system for every school, every teacher, and every interaction at educate.ie.</div>
    <div class="crm-stat"><div class="crm-num">4,000+</div><div class="crm-lbl">schools in Ireland &mdash; all in one place</div></div>
    <div class="crm-stat"><div class="crm-num">Zero</div><div class="crm-lbl">sticky notes, spreadsheets, or guesswork</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="crm-r">
    <div class="crm-pts">
      <div class="crm-pt"><div class="crm-ic">&#x1F3EB;</div><div><div class="crm-pt-t">A record for every school</div><div class="crm-pt-b">Every school has its own Company record &mdash; contacts, history, notes, and deals in one view.</div></div></div>
      <div class="crm-pt"><div class="crm-ic">&#x1F464;</div><div><div class="crm-pt-t">A record for every teacher</div><div class="crm-pt-b">Every principal, subject head, and librarian is a Contact &mdash; linked to their school with full history.</div></div></div>
      <div class="crm-pt"><div class="crm-ic">&#x1F4CB;</div><div><div class="crm-pt-t">A log of every interaction</div><div class="crm-pt-b">Calls, emails, visits, notes, tasks &mdash; everything timestamped and visible to the whole team.</div></div></div>
      <div class="crm-pt"><div class="crm-ic">&#x1F50D;</div><div><div class="crm-pt-t">Everyone sees the same thing</div><div class="crm-pt-b">No more &ldquo;I thought you were covering that school.&rdquo; If it&rsquo;s in HubSpot, the team knows.</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-isnt" id="s5">
  <div class="isn-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 01</span><h2>HubSpot is and isn&rsquo;t</h2></div>
  <div class="isn-body">
    <div class="isn-col do"><div class="isn-hdr"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;background:#1E5631;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#8DC63F">&#x2713;</div><h3>It is</h3></div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; A record of every school relationship</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; A place to log calls, visits, and emails</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; A tool to manage your territory and tasks</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; A shared resource for the whole team</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; Protection for your work when you&rsquo;re out</div></div>
    <div class="isn-col dont"><div class="isn-hdr"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;background:#fdf0f0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#b52020">&#x2718;</div><h3>It isn&rsquo;t</h3></div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; A tool to monitor how often you work</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; Extra admin on top of your real job</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; A replacement for phone calls and visits</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; A way to catch people out</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; Something that works without you updating it</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s6">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 1: What Is a CRM?</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">HubSpot is one shared system for every school, teacher, and interaction at educate.ie.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">It replaces scattered notes, emails, spreadsheets, and memory.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">It is not surveillance &mdash; it is protection for your work and your territory.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">It only works if you use it. The team depends on your records being up to date.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s7">
  <div class="mi-bg">02</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 02</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Navigating<br>HubSpot</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Log in, navigate with confidence, use global search, and save a filtered view for your territory.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-login" id="s8">
  <div class="login-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.8rem;display:inline-block">Module 02</span>
    <div class="login-title">Logging in<br>to HubSpot</div>
    <div class="login-pts">
      <div class="login-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Go to <strong>app.hubspot.com</strong> or use your browser bookmark</span></div>
      <div class="login-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Click <strong>Sign in with Google</strong> &mdash; use your educate.ie Google account</span></div>
      <div class="login-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>You will land on the educate.ie portal automatically</span></div>
      <div class="login-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Bookmark it &mdash; you will be logging in every working day</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="login-tip">&#x1F4A1; If you see a different portal after login, use the account switcher in the top right corner.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="login-r"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot login screen"></div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss2" id="s9">
  <div class="ss2-left">
    <span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.8rem;display:inline-block">Module 02</span>
    <div class="ss2-title">The left navigation bar</div>
    <div class="ss2-body">
      <div class="ss-pt2"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>CRM</strong> &mdash; Contacts, Schools, Deals, Tasks &mdash; your main workspace</span></div>
      <div class="ss-pt2"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Marketing</strong> &mdash; lists, emails, campaigns &mdash; mostly the marketing team</span></div>
      <div class="ss-pt2"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Reporting</strong> &mdash; dashboards and rep activity &mdash; your manager uses this</span></div>
      <div class="ss-pt2"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Breeze</strong> &mdash; AI features: call summaries and contact insights</span></div>
      <div class="ss-pt2"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Click CRM to expand the submenu shown in this screenshot</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ss2-cap">It never changes. Everything you need is always in the same place.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ss2-right"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot left navigation"></div>
</div><div class="slide s-nav" id="s10">
  <div class="nav-l"><span class="tag tg">Module 02</span>
    <div style="font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.4rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;margin:0.8rem 0 0.6rem;line-height:1.1">Try it yourself</div>
    <div style="color:var(--w60);font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:1.5rem">Click each menu item to learn what it is for.</div>
    <div class="callouts">
      <div class="callout"><div class="cn">1</div><div class="ct"><strong>CRM</strong> &mdash; contacts, schools, deals, tasks</div></div>
      <div class="callout"><div class="cn">2</div><div class="ct"><strong>Marketing</strong> &mdash; lists, emails, campaigns</div></div>
      <div class="callout"><div class="cn">3</div><div class="ct"><strong>Reporting</strong> &mdash; dashboards and activity</div></div>
      <div class="callout"><div class="cn">4</div><div class="ct"><strong>Breeze</strong> &mdash; AI features</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="nav-r">
    <div style="font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#999;margin-bottom:0.6rem">Click to explore</div>
    <div class="nav-mk">
      <div class="nav-tb"><div class="tl" style="background:#ff5f57"></div><div class="tl" style="background:#febc2e"></div><div class="tl" style="background:#28c840"></div><span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:0.72rem;margin-left:8px">HubSpot &middot; educate.ie</span></div>
      <div class="nav-its">
        <div class="nav-it on" onclick="setNav(this,&quot;crm&quot;)">&#x229E; &nbsp;CRM</div>
        <div class="nav-it" onclick="setNav(this,&quot;mkt&quot;)">&#x1F4E3; &nbsp;Marketing</div>
        <div class="nav-it" onclick="setNav(this,&quot;sales&quot;)">&#x1F4BC; &nbsp;Sales</div>
        <div class="nav-sec">Data</div>
        <div class="nav-it" onclick="setNav(this,&quot;auto&quot;)">&#x26A1; &nbsp;Automation</div>
        <div class="nav-it" onclick="setNav(this,&quot;rep&quot;)">&#x1F4CA; &nbsp;Reporting</div>
        <div class="nav-sec">AI</div>
        <div class="nav-it" onclick="setNav(this,&quot;breeze&quot;)">&#x2736; &nbsp;Breeze</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="nav-tip">Click a menu item to see what it is for.</div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s11">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot global search"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 02</span><div class="ss-title">Always search first</div><div class="ss-cap">&#x26A0;&#xFE0F; Search before creating anything. Duplicates are the number one data quality problem.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Press <strong>Cmd+K</strong> or <strong>Ctrl+K</strong> from anywhere in HubSpot</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Type a teacher name, school name, or roll number &mdash; results appear instantly</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Filter by Contacts, Deals, or Schools using the tabs shown at the top</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Click any result to open the record directly &mdash; no navigation needed</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s12">
  <div class="ss-img" style="flex-direction:row;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start">
    <div style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.8rem;min-width:0">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" style="width:100%;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.2);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" style="max-width:55%;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(168,213,90,0.2);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 02</span><div class="ss-title">Filtered views &mdash; your territory in one click</div><div class="ss-cap">Filter once, save the view, it&rsquo;s there every login.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>The tab bar shows your saved views &mdash; South-East Region, North-West Region etc.</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Advanced Filters stack conditions: owner + school type + engagement level</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Click <strong>Save view</strong> to name it and keep it in your sidebar permanently</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Recommended views: My Schools, My Territory, No Recent Activity, Samples Sent</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s13">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Contacts list view"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 02</span><div class="ss-title">The contacts list view</div><div class="ss-cap">This is what you see when you open Contacts in the CRM.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Use the saved view tabs at the top to switch between your territory filters</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Actions</strong> menu &mdash; bulk edit, import, manage duplicates, data quality</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Create contact</strong> button top right &mdash; but always search first</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Columns are customisable &mdash; click Edit columns to add or remove fields</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s14">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 2: Navigating HubSpot</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">The left nav never changes &mdash; CRM is your main workspace.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Cmd+K or Ctrl+K gives instant global search from anywhere in the system.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Set up filtered views for your territory and save them &mdash; they&rsquo;re there every login.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">Always search before creating any new record.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s15">
  <div class="mi-bg">03</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 03</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Objects</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Know the four objects in HubSpot and exactly how they map to the way educate.ie works.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-obj" id="s16">
  <div class="obj-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 03</span><h2>The four objects</h2><p>Click each card to see how it maps to educate.ie</p></div>
  <div class="obj-grid">
    <div class="obj" onclick="flipObj(this)">
      <div class="obj-n">Object 01</div><div class="obj-icon" style="background:#edf5dc">&#x1F464;</div>
      <div class="obj-name">Contacts</div><div class="obj-type" style="color:#1E5631">= People</div>
      <div class="obj-desc">Teachers, principals, subject heads, librarians. Every individual person in the system.</div>
      <div class="obj-eg">e.g. Beth Ann McDonnell, Geography, Loreto Secondary School</div>
      <div class="obj-flip"><h3>Contacts at educate.ie</h3><p>Every teacher and decision-maker &mdash; linked to their school with full history.</p><ul><li>Subject(s) they teach</li><li>Their school (linked Company)</li><li>Lifecycle Stage &mdash; Lead, Customer</li><li>Every call, email, note logged</li></ul><div class="obj-hint">click to close</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="obj" onclick="flipObj(this)">
      <div class="obj-n">Object 02</div><div class="obj-icon" style="background:#edf5dc">&#x1F3EB;</div>
      <div class="obj-name">Companies</div><div class="obj-type" style="color:#1E5631">= Schools</div>
      <div class="obj-desc">Every school is a Company record. CBS Naas, Col&aacute;iste Mhuire, St Mary&rsquo;s.</div>
      <div class="obj-eg">e.g. Loreto Secondary School, Kilkenny, Roll: 61580P</div>
      <div class="obj-flip"><h3>Schools at educate.ie</h3><p>The anchor record &mdash; all notes, tasks, and deals roll up here.</p><ul><li>School type (primary, secondary)</li><li>County and region</li><li>All associated contacts</li><li>DEIS status, roll number</li></ul><div class="obj-hint">click to close</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="obj" onclick="flipObj(this)">
      <div class="obj-n">Object 03</div><div class="obj-icon" style="background:#fef9ec">&#x1F4BC;</div>
      <div class="obj-name">Deals</div><div class="obj-type" style="color:#B8860B">= Pipeline</div>
      <div class="obj-desc">A Deal tracks a sales opportunity. One deal per school per order cycle.</div>
      <div class="obj-eg">e.g. Loreto Secondary School &mdash; Leaving Cert Geography 2025</div>
      <div class="obj-flip"><h3>Deals at educate.ie</h3><p>Moves through pipeline stages from Prospecting to Closed Won.</p><ul><li>Deal value and expected close date</li><li>Pipeline stage</li><li>Linked to the school record</li><li>Associated rep and territory</li></ul><div class="obj-hint">click to close</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="obj" onclick="flipObj(this)">
      <div class="obj-n">Object 04</div><div class="obj-icon" style="background:#f0f0ff">&#x2705;</div>
      <div class="obj-name">Tasks</div><div class="obj-type" style="color:#6644bb">= To-dos</div>
      <div class="obj-desc">Follow-up actions linked to a Contact or School. Due date, type, and owner.</div>
      <div class="obj-eg">e.g. Send sample Geography book to Beth Ann &mdash; Due 25 Jun</div>
      <div class="obj-flip"><h3>Tasks at educate.ie</h3><p>Never lose a follow-up &mdash; shows in your task queue with a due date.</p><ul><li>Task type: call, email, to-do</li><li>Due date and reminder</li><li>Linked contact and school</li><li>Assigned to a rep</li></ul><div class="obj-hint">click to close</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s17">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot objects selector"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 03</span><div class="ss-title">The four objects &mdash; as seen in HubSpot</div><div class="ss-cap">HubSpot organises everything into these four object types.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Companies</strong> = Schools &mdash; every school you work with</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Contacts</strong> = People &mdash; every teacher, principal, librarian</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Deals</strong> = Pipeline &mdash; one per school per order cycle</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Tickets</strong> = Support cases &mdash; used by the customer success team</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s18">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 3: Objects</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Contacts are people. Companies are schools. Deals are pipeline. Tasks are to-dos.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Every Contact must be linked to at least one Company (school).</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">A Contact can be linked to multiple schools &mdash; one is set as primary.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">Deals are created per school per order cycle &mdash; not per conversation.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s19">
  <div class="mi-bg">04</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 04</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Navigating<br>Records</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Open any Contact or School record and know exactly where every piece of information lives.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-pan" id="s20">
  <div class="pan-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 04</span><h2>Every record has three panels</h2></div>
  <div class="pan-body">
    <div class="pan-col pl"><div class="pan-lbl">Left panel</div><div class="pan-name">Properties</div>
      <div class="pan-items">
        <div class="pan-item">Contact owner &mdash; who owns this record</div>
        <div class="pan-item">School &mdash; which school they&rsquo;re linked to</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Subject(s) &mdash; what they teach</div>
        <div class="pan-item">School Type &mdash; primary, secondary</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Lifecycle Stage &mdash; Lead, Customer</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Phone, email, city</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pan-note">Click any field to edit it. Changes save automatically when you click away.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pan-col pc"><div class="pan-lbl">Centre panel</div><div class="pan-name">Timeline</div>
      <div class="pan-items">
        <div class="pan-item">Notes &mdash; logged after a call or visit</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Emails &mdash; sent and received, all logged</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Calls &mdash; logged from the record or app</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Tasks &mdash; upcoming follow-ups</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Meetings &mdash; logged school visits</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Contact Activity &mdash; system events</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pan-note">The institutional memory. Every interaction, in order, timestamped.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pan-col pr"><div class="pan-lbl">Right panel</div><div class="pan-name">Associations</div>
      <div class="pan-items">
        <div class="pan-item">Schools (1) &mdash; their primary school</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Deals &mdash; any open pipeline deals</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Tickets &mdash; any support cases</div>
        <div class="pan-item">Attachments &mdash; files on the record</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pan-note">A contact with no school linked is broken data. Always associate before saving.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s21">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Beth Ann contact record three panels"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 04</span><div class="ss-title">The three-panel layout &mdash; real contact record</div><div class="ss-cap">Every Contact and School record looks exactly like this.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Left:</strong> Key information &mdash; owner, subject, school type, lifecycle stage</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Centre:</strong> All activities tab &mdash; complete interaction timeline</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Right:</strong> Schools (1) &mdash; Loreto Secondary School linked as Primary</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Tabs at top of centre panel filter the timeline by activity type</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s22">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Beth Ann with note and task"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tw" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Live record &middot; Beth Ann McDonnell</span><div class="ss-title">Reading the timeline</div><div class="ss-cap">A real record &mdash; every entry here was logged by the team.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Note by Sophie Mason</strong> &mdash; chatty, finds digital materials hard, EdPal opportunity</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Task</strong> &mdash; Send sample of Geography book, due Jun 25 2026</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Contact Activity</strong> &mdash; Morgan Powell moved Beth Ann to Lead</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Timeline shows everything newest first &mdash; scroll down to see full history</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s23">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Loreto Secondary School record"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tw" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Live record &middot; Loreto Secondary School</span><div class="ss-title">Reading a school record</div><div class="ss-cap">Every contact at this school rolls up here. This is your territory view.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>59 contacts</strong> linked &mdash; all teachers at Loreto visible in the right panel</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>School owner Kayla Martin, City Kilkenny, Roll Number 61580P</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Outbound activity</strong> &mdash; Task and Note by Sophie Mason in Recent Interactions</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>No inbound activity yet &mdash; the school has not contacted educate.ie</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s24">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 4: Navigating Records</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Every record has three panels: Properties (left), Timeline (centre), Associations (right).</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Click any field in the left panel to edit it &mdash; changes save automatically.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">The timeline is the institutional memory &mdash; every interaction, timestamped.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">A contact with no school linked is broken data. Always associate before saving.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s25">
  <div class="mi-bg">05</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 05</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Search Before<br>Creating</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Search before creating any record &mdash; every time, without exception.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-think" id="s26">
  <div class="tk-w">
    <span class="tag ta">Think about this</span>
    <div class="tk-q">You want to add a new teacher at <mark>Loreto Secondary School.</mark> What do you do first?</div>
    <div class="tk-cards"><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p5')"><div class="tc-i">&#x1F50D;</div><div class="tc-l">Search by name</div></div><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p5')"><div class="tc-i">&#x1F3EB;</div><div class="tc-l">Search by school</div></div><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p5')"><div class="tc-i">&#x2795;</div><div class="tc-l">Click Create Contact</div></div><div class="tc" onclick="pick(this,'p5')"><div class="tc-i">&#x1F914;</div><div class="tc-l">Ask a colleague</div></div></div>
    <div class="tk-p" id="p5">Search first. Always. If you skip this step, you create duplicates.</div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s27">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot global search"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 05</span><div class="ss-title">Always search before creating</div><div class="ss-cap">The golden rule. No exceptions. This protects every person on the team.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Type the school or teacher name into global search (Cmd+K)</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Check both <strong>Contacts</strong> and <strong>Schools</strong> tabs before concluding it does not exist</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>If you find them &mdash; open the existing record and update it</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>If you genuinely cannot find them &mdash; then create a new record</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s28">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Contacts list"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 05</span><div class="ss-title">Why this matters</div><div class="ss-cap">Duplicate records are the most damaging data quality problem in any CRM.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Split history</strong> &mdash; two records means two incomplete timelines</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Wrong reporting</strong> &mdash; duplicates inflate contact counts and skew territory data</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Missed follow-ups</strong> &mdash; tasks on a duplicate record no one opens</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>Admin time</strong> &mdash; merging duplicates is slow, manual work for the admin team</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s29">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 5: Search Before Creating</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Search before creating any record &mdash; contacts, schools, deals, everything.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Use Cmd+K or Ctrl+K to search from anywhere in HubSpot.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Check both the Contacts tab and the Schools tab before concluding a record does not exist.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">If you find them, update the existing record. If not, then create.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s30">
  <div class="mi-bg">06</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 06</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Logging<br>Activity</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Log calls, emails, meetings, and notes directly on any record &mdash; same day, every time.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-info" id="s31">
  <div class="info-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 06</span><h2>Five ways to log activity</h2><p>From any Contact or School record, use the action bar at the top of the left panel.</p></div>
  <div class="info-body"><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">&#x1F4DD; Note</div><div class="info-item">What happened on a call or visit</div><div class="info-item">Context about a school or teacher</div><div class="info-item">Information for a colleague who opens the record</div><div class="info-item">No due date &mdash; just a permanent log</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">&#x1F4DE; Call</div><div class="info-item">Log a call you made or received</div><div class="info-item">Add notes during or after the call</div><div class="info-item">Duration and outcome recorded</div><div class="info-item">Appears in timeline with timestamp</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">&#x1F4E7; Email</div><div class="info-item">Send email directly from HubSpot</div><div class="info-item">Logs automatically if Gmail is connected</div><div class="info-item">Full email thread visible on the record</div><div class="info-item">Open and click tracking available</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">&#x2705; Task</div><div class="info-item">Create a follow-up action with a due date</div><div class="info-item">Assign to yourself or a colleague</div><div class="info-item">Appears in the task queue</div><div class="info-item">See Module 7 for full task guidance</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">&#x1F4C5; Meeting</div><div class="info-item">Log a school visit or meeting</div><div class="info-item">School Visit type for in-person visits</div><div class="info-item">Record outcome and next step</div><div class="info-item">Links to both Contact and School record</div></div></div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s32">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Beth Ann contact record with note"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 06</span><div class="ss-title">Logging from a contact record</div><div class="ss-cap">Every activity is logged directly on the record &mdash; no separate app needed.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Use the action bar: Note, Email, Call, Task, Meeting &mdash; always on the record</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Add as much detail as you can &mdash; these notes are the institutional memory of the team</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Type <strong>@</strong> and a colleague name inside any note to notify them &mdash; it stays on the record permanently</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Click the <strong>three-dot menu</strong> on any note to <strong>Pin it</strong> &mdash; keeps critical info at the top of the timeline</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s33">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot calling dialog"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 06</span><div class="ss-title">Logging a call</div><div class="ss-cap">You can call directly from HubSpot and it logs automatically.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Click the <strong>Call</strong> button on any Contact record to open the calling dialog</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Dial from your browser &mdash; take notes during the call in the Notes field</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>When you hang up, the call is logged on the record with duration and notes</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>You can also log calls you made outside HubSpot using the Log Activity option</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ex" id="s34">
  <div class="ex-bg">TRY IT</div>
  <div class="ex-body-wrap">
    <span class="tag ta" style="margin-bottom:1rem;display:inline-block">Module 06</span>
    <div class="ex-title">Log a Note and @Mention</div>
    <div class="ex-instruct">Practice logging on a real record.</div>
    <div class="ex-steps"><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">01</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Open Beth Ann McDonnell&rsquo;s record</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Search for Beth Ann in global search and open her Contact record.</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">02</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Write a note</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Click Note. Write: "Called to discuss Geography sample. Very keen. Suggested EdPal demo."</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">03</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">@Mention a colleague</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Type @ and your own name in the note. See the notification appear.</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">04</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Check the timeline</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Close the note. Can you see it in the timeline with a timestamp?</div></div></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s35">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 6: Logging Activity</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Log every call, visit, email, and note on the same day &mdash; never rely on memory.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Use the action bar on any Contact or School record: Note, Email, Call, Task, Meeting.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Use @mentions to notify colleagues directly within a note &mdash; it stays on the record permanently.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">Pin a note to the top of the timeline for critical context anyone opening the record must see first.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s36">
  <div class="mi-bg">07</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 07</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Tasks</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Create tasks, work through a task queue, and never lose track of a follow-up.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-info" id="s37">
  <div class="info-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 07</span><h2>Note or Task? Know the difference</h2><p>People mix these up constantly. Getting this right keeps your records clean and follow-ups reliable.</p></div>
  <div class="info-body">
    <div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">&#x1F4DD; NOTE &mdash; records what happened</div><div class="info-item">A call you made</div><div class="info-item">A visit you completed</div><div class="info-item">Context about a school or contact</div><div class="info-item">Information for a colleague who opens the record</div><div class="info-item"><strong>No due date. No reminder. Just a log.</strong></div></div>
    <div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">&#x2705; TASK &mdash; triggers what needs to happen next</div><div class="info-item">A follow-up call you need to make</div><div class="info-item">A sample to send by Friday</div><div class="info-item">Anything with a due date and an owner</div><div class="info-item"><strong>Has a due date. Has a reminder. Shows in your task queue.</strong></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s38">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot task queue"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 07</span><div class="ss-title">The task queue</div><div class="ss-cap">Your prioritised to-do list &mdash; everything that needs action, in one place.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Go to CRM &rarr; Tasks to see your full task queue</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Filter by <strong>Due today</strong>, <strong>Overdue</strong>, <strong>Upcoming</strong>, or <strong>Most engaged</strong></span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Every task links to a Contact or School &mdash; click to open the record directly</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Overdue tasks show in red &mdash; action these first</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s39">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Create task panel"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 07</span><div class="ss-title">Creating a task</div><div class="ss-cap">Create tasks from within a record or directly from the task queue.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>From a record:</strong> open any Contact or School, click Create Task</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Add a title, due date, type (Call, Email, To-Do), and assign to yourself or a colleague</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span><strong>From the queue:</strong> go to Tasks and click Create Task &mdash; link to a record manually</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Automated tasks are created by HubSpot when certain actions happen &mdash; treat them the same</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s40">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Task detail panel"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 07</span><div class="ss-title">Task detail &mdash; a real example</div><div class="ss-cap">This is what a task looks like when you open it from the timeline.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Title: <strong>Send sample of Geography book</strong></span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Due: Jun 25 at 8:00 AM &mdash; assigned to Stacey Byrne, type: To-Do</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Associated with 2 records: the Contact and the School</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>To complete: click the tick on the timeline or check it off in the task queue</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-ex" id="s41">
  <div class="ex-bg">TRY IT</div>
  <div class="ex-body-wrap">
    <span class="tag ta" style="margin-bottom:1rem;display:inline-block">Module 07</span>
    <div class="ex-title">Create and Complete a Task</div>
    <div class="ex-instruct">Practice the full task workflow.</div>
    <div class="ex-steps"><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">01</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Open any school record and click Create Task</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Title: "Test task from training". Due: today. Type: To-Do.</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">02</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Go to Activities &rarr; Tasks</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Find your task in the Today filter.</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">03</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Complete the task</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Click the tick. Add a completion note: "Completed during training."</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">04</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Check the school record timeline</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Can you see the completed task logged there?</div></div></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s42">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 7: Tasks</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Tasks are your HubSpot to-do list &mdash; every task links to a Contact or Company.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Create tasks from within a record or directly from the Task Queue.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Some tasks are triggered automatically by HubSpot &mdash; treat these the same as manual ones.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">Complete with a note, reschedule if needed, never leave tasks overdue without action.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s43">
  <div class="mi-bg">08</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 08</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Duplicates<br>and Edge Cases</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Identify a duplicate, know when to flag it, and know what not to do.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-info" id="s44">
  <div class="info-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 08</span><h2>Ambiguous names and roll numbers</h2><p>St Mary&rsquo;s Secondary School exists in at least a dozen towns.</p></div>
  <div class="info-body">
    <div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">Search by roll number first</div><div class="info-item">The roll number is the only truly unique identifier for a school</div><div class="info-item">Example: 61580P = Loreto Secondary School, Kilkenny</div><div class="info-item">Always include the town for ambiguous names: St Mary&rsquo;s CBS Naas</div><div class="info-item">Cross-reference with the Department of Education website if unsure</div></div>
    <div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">Teacher at multiple schools</div><div class="info-item">Do not create two Contact records for the same person</div><div class="info-item">Create one Contact and associate it with both Company records</div><div class="info-item">HubSpot supports one Contact linked to multiple Companies</div><div class="info-item">Set one school as the primary association</div><div class="info-item">Log activities against the specific school they relate to</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-isnt" id="s45">
  <div class="isn-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 08</span><h2>When you find a duplicate</h2></div>
  <div class="isn-body">
    <div class="isn-col do"><div class="isn-hdr"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;background:#1E5631;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#8DC63F">&#x2713;</div><h3>DO</h3></div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; Flag it immediately using the feedback channel</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; Note on both records: "Possible duplicate, flagged to admin, [date]"</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; Use the more complete record until resolved</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2714; Contact admin directly if it is urgent</div></div>
    <div class="isn-col dont"><div class="isn-hdr"><div style="width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;background:#fdf0f0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#b52020">&#x2718;</div><h3>DON&rsquo;T</h3></div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; Merge records yourself &mdash; merging is admin-only</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; Delete either record</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; Ignore it and carry on using both</div><div class="isn-row">&#x2718; Create a third record to work around it</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s46">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 8: Duplicates</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Always search by roll number for schools &mdash; it is the only truly unique identifier.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Same name does not mean same person. Confirm with email or phone.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Teacher at two schools? One Contact record, two Company associations.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">Found a duplicate? Flag it. Never merge, never delete &mdash; that is admin-only.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s47">
  <div class="mi-bg">09</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 09</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Data<br>Validation</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Spot the three types of bad data and apply the daily habits that prevent them.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-info" id="s48">
  <div class="info-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 09</span><h2>The three types of bad data</h2><p>Bad data means wrong reports, missed follow-ups, and time wasted chasing ghosts.</p></div>
  <div class="info-body"><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">01 Missing data</div><div class="info-item">No County, no School Type, no Contacts linked</div><div class="info-item">Record exists but is dangerously incomplete</div><div class="info-item">Fix: fill in required fields before saving any new record</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">02 Inaccurate data</div><div class="info-item">Outdated job titles, stale phone numbers, wrong email</div><div class="info-item">Record exists but is wrong</div><div class="info-item">Fix: update records the same day anything changes</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">03 Duplicated data</div><div class="info-item">Two records for the same school or person</div><div class="info-item">History is split across both &mdash; neither is complete</div><div class="info-item">Fix: see Module 8 &mdash; flag to admin, never merge yourself</div></div></div>
</div><div class="slide s-ss" id="s49">
  <div class="ss-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="HubSpot dropdown filters"></div>
  <div class="ss-bar">
    <div class="ss-bar-l"><span class="tag tg" style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;display:inline-block">Module 09</span><div class="ss-title">The dropdown rule</div><div class="ss-cap">Always select from dropdown fields. Never type freeform into a dropdown.</div></div>
    <div class="ss-bar-r"><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Typing &ldquo;Co. Dublin&rdquo; instead of selecting &ldquo;Dublin&rdquo; makes that record <strong>invisible to all Dublin filters</strong></span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>This is one of the most common data quality mistakes in every CRM rollout</span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>If the value you need does not exist in the dropdown, <strong>ask admin to add it</strong></span></div><div class="ss-pt"><span class="ss-arr">&#x2192;</span><span>Required fields with dropdowns are there specifically to prevent this</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s50">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 9: Data Validation</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Three types of bad data: missing, inaccurate, and duplicated.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Required fields stop missing data at the point of creation &mdash; fill them in every time.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Always select from dropdowns &mdash; typing creates values invisible to reports and filters.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">Update records the same day anything changes. Do not let records go stale.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s51">
  <div class="mi-bg">10</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 10</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Governance</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Know the naming conventions, understand record ownership, and know which actions require admin approval.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-info" id="s52">
  <div class="info-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 10</span><h2>Naming conventions</h2><p>Consistent naming makes search, filtering, and reporting reliable for everyone.</p></div>
  <div class="info-body"><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">Schools</div><div class="info-item">Full official registered name</div><div class="info-item">Include town for ambiguous names: St Mary&rsquo;s CBS Naas</div><div class="info-item">No commas in school names</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">Deals</div><div class="info-item">Format: School Name | Subject | Year</div><div class="info-item">Example: CBS Naas | Junior Cert English | 2025</div><div class="info-item">Never use: test, temp, or copy</div></div><div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">Lists</div><div class="info-item">Format: Team | Purpose | Date</div><div class="info-item">Example: Sales | Lapsed Schools Leinster | Q3 2025</div><div class="info-item">Created by admin only</div></div></div>
</div><div class="slide s-info" id="s53">
  <div class="info-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 10</span><h2>What requires admin approval</h2><p>Six action types are admin-only. Raise requests through the feedback channel.</p></div>
  <div class="info-body">
    <div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">Requires admin approval</div><div class="info-item">01 Pipeline stage edits &mdash; adding, removing, or renaming any deal stage</div><div class="info-item">02 Dropdown changes &mdash; adding new values to any dropdown field</div><div class="info-item">03 New properties &mdash; adding new fields to Contacts, Companies, or Deals</div><div class="info-item">04 Record merges &mdash; all duplicate merges are admin-only</div><div class="info-item">05 Workflow edits &mdash; changes to automated workflows or task triggers</div><div class="info-item">06 User permissions &mdash; access levels, team assignments, new user set-up</div></div>
    <div class="info-col"><div class="info-col-title">Your role</div><div class="info-item">Update records and log activity &mdash; no approval needed</div><div class="info-item">Create contacts, schools, and deals &mdash; no approval needed</div><div class="info-item">Request admin actions through the feedback channel</div><div class="info-item">Every record has one owner &mdash; no blanks allowed in the Owner field</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s54">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 10: Governance</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Every record has one owner.
