No blanks allowed in the Owner field.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Naming conventions exist for Companies, Deals, and Lists &mdash; follow them every time.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Six action types require admin approval: stages, dropdowns, properties, merges, workflows, permissions.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">Raise requests through the feedback channel. Do not make admin-level changes yourself.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-mi" id="s55">
  <div class="mi-bg">11</div>
  <div class="mi-body">
    <div class="mi-pre">Module 11</div>
    <div class="mi-title">Mobile App</div>
    <div class="mi-lo"><div class="mi-ey">By the end of this module you will</div><div class="mi-tx">Download, set up, and use the HubSpot mobile app to log activity from anywhere.</div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-tips" id="s56">
  <div class="tips-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 11</span><h2>Download, set up, and log in</h2></div>
  <div class="tips-body"><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Download</div><div class="tip-body">Search HubSpot in the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android). It is free.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Log in</div><div class="tip-body">Use the same credentials as desktop &mdash; everything syncs automatically.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Find a record</div><div class="tip-body">Use the search bar at the top &mdash; same global search as desktop.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Log activity</div><div class="tip-body">Open any record and tap the + or activity icon to log a note, call, or meeting.</div></div></div>
</div><div class="slide s-tips" id="s57">
  <div class="tips-hd"><span class="tag tg">Module 11</span><h2>The Car Park Rule</h2></div>
  <div class="tips-body"><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Log before you drive</div><div class="tip-body">90 seconds in the car park saves 10 minutes later. Log the visit before you leave the school.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Use voice to text</div><div class="tip-body">Tap the microphone on your keyboard. Speak naturally: &ldquo;Met with Ciara Murphy, Head of English. Interested in sample set. Follow up in two weeks.&rdquo;</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Review before saving</div><div class="tip-body">Voice to text is fast but not perfect. Read it back before tapping Save.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">School visits</div><div class="tip-body">Use Meeting type. Fill in outcome and next step before closing the record.</div></div></div>
</div><div class="slide s-ex" id="s58">
  <div class="ex-bg">TRY IT</div>
  <div class="ex-body-wrap">
    <span class="tag ta" style="margin-bottom:1rem;display:inline-block">Module 11</span>
    <div class="ex-title">Set Up the Mobile App</div>
    <div class="ex-instruct">Get HubSpot on your phone before training ends.</div>
    <div class="ex-steps"><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">01</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Download HubSpot from the App Store or Google Play</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Search &ldquo;HubSpot&rdquo; &mdash; it is the orange sprocket icon.</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">02</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Log in and allow notifications</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Use the same email and password as desktop.</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">03</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Find a school record using mobile search</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Search for a school you know and open it.</div></div></div><div class="ex-step"><div class="ex-num">04</div><div class="ex-body"><div class="ex-step-title">Practice logging a note using voice to text</div><div class="ex-step-desc">Tap the microphone, speak a test note, review it, then delete it.</div></div></div></div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-sum" id="s59">
  <div class="sum-tag"><span class="tag tw">Module Summary</span></div>
  <div class="sum-title">Module 11: Mobile App</div>
  <div class="sum-rows"><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">01</div><div class="sum-text">Download the HubSpot app and log in with your usual credentials &mdash; everything syncs.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">02</div><div class="sum-text">Log calls, meetings, and notes directly from a record on mobile.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">03</div><div class="sum-text">Use voice to text for meeting notes &mdash; speak your summary before leaving the car park.</div></div><div class="sum-row"><div class="sum-num">04</div><div class="sum-text">The Car Park Rule: log the visit before you drive away. Every time.</div></div></div>
  <div class="sum-tick">&#x2713;</div>
</div><div class="slide s-bylive" id="s60">
  <div class="bylive-inner">
    <span class="tag ta" style="margin-bottom:1rem;display:inline-block">BEFORE YOU GO LIVE</span>
    <div class="bylive-title">Connect Your Gmail</div>
    <div class="bylive-intro">Without this, emails you send do not log in HubSpot. Connect it once and it works automatically.</div>
    <div class="bylive-steps"><div class="bylive-step"><div class="bylive-num">01</div><div class="bylive-text">Click your profile icon (top right) &mdash; go to <strong>Profile and Preferences</strong></div></div><div class="bylive-step"><div class="bylive-num">02</div><div class="bylive-text">Select the <strong>Email</strong> tab &mdash; click <strong>Connect an Inbox</strong></div></div><div class="bylive-step"><div class="bylive-num">03</div><div class="bylive-text">Choose <strong>Google (Gmail)</strong> &mdash; log in and allow permissions</div></div></div>
    <div class="bylive-note">From now on, emails you send to school contacts log to HubSpot automatically.</div>
  </div>
</div><div class="slide s-tips" id="s61">
  <div class="tips-hd"><span class="tag tg">Before You Go Live</span><h2>Set up your profile</h2></div>
  <div class="tips-body"><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Email Signature</div><div class="tip-body">Profile and Preferences &rarr; Email &rarr; Signature. Set this before sending your first email from HubSpot.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Profile Photo</div><div class="tip-body">Your photo appears on tasks and notes &mdash; it makes handoffs feel human. Add it in Profile and Preferences.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Notifications</div><div class="tip-body">Profile &rarr; Notifications. Turn off anything you do not need so the useful ones get your attention.</div></div><div class="tip-card"><div class="tip-title">Time Zone</div><div class="tip-body">Profile and Preferences &rarr; General. Set your timezone correctly &mdash; it affects all scheduled reminders.</div></div></div>
</div><div class="slide s-end" id="s62">
  <div class="end-rings"><div class="end-ring e1"></div><div class="end-ring e2"></div></div>
  <div class="end-inner">
    <div class="end-check">&#x2713;</div>
    <div class="end-title">Done.<br><em>All modules complete.</em></div>
    <div class="end-sub">Remember the three habits that matter most.</div>
    <div class="end-recap" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)">
      <div class="er"><div class="er-num">01</div><div class="er-lbl">Search before you create</div></div>
      <div class="er"><div class="er-num">02</div><div class="er-lbl">Log it the same day</div></div>
      <div class="er"><div class="er-num">03</div><div class="er-lbl">Keep your records accurate</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:1rem;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--w60)">Questions? Use the feedback channel or speak to the CRM administrator.</div>
    <div class="end-btns" style="margin-top:1.5rem"><button class="btn-p" onclick="goTo(0)">Start again</button></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="nb">
  <button onclick="prev()">&larr;</button>
  <div class="dots" id="dots"></div>
  <span class="ctr" id="ctr">1 / 63</span>
  <button onclick="next()">&rarr;</button>
</div>
<script>
const N=63;let cur=0;
const NT={
  crm:"CRM is your main workspace: Contacts, Schools (Companies), Deals, and Tasks.",
  mkt:"Marketing covers lists, email campaigns, and segments. Mostly used by the Marketing team.",
  sales:"Sales contains sequences and templates for follow-up campaigns.",
  auto:"Automation is where workflows live. Admin-managed only.",
  rep:"Reporting shows dashboards and activity. Your manager uses this to track performance.",
  breeze:"Breeze is HubSpot built-in AI. Great for summarising contact history and writing emails."
};
function goTo(n){document.querySelectorAll('.slide').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));document.getElementById('s'+n).classList.add('active');cur=n;document.getElementById('ctr').textContent=(n+1)+' / '+N;document.querySelectorAll('.dot').forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle('active',i===n));}
function next(){if(cur<N-1)goTo(cur+1)}
function prev(){if(cur>0)goTo(cur-1)}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='ArrowRight'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();next();}if(e.key==='ArrowLeft'){e.preventDefault();prev();} });
function pick(el,pid){document.querySelectorAll('.tc').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('picked'));el.classList.add('picked');const p=document.getElementById(pid);if(p)p.classList.add('show');}
function flipObj(el){const was=el.classList.contains('flipped');document.querySelectorAll('.obj').forEach(o=>o.classList.remove('flipped'));if(!was)el.classList.add('flipped');}
function setNav(el,k){document.querySelectorAll('.nav-it').forEach(i=>i.classList.remove('on'));el.classList.add('on');document.getElementById('nav-tip').textContent=NT[k]||'';}
(function(){const c=document.getElementById('dots');for(let i=0;i<N;i++){const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='dot'+(i===0?' active':'');d.onclick=()=>goTo(i);c.appendChild(d);}})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
